meaning: n.摩尼教adj.摩尼教的,摩尼教徒的
examples: The human fascination with fire has a Manichean quality.
This Manichean split amounts to a "travesty of history and memory".
This Manichean split amounts to a “travesty of history and memory”.
Mr Calvert does not disguise the crudely Manichean character of Qutb's worldview.
Does Mr Blair have a Manichean philosophy?
